definitions.name: filter:where:ORDER_MED.PAT_ENC_CSN_ID
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM order_med AS om WHERE order_med.pat_enc_csn_id = pat_enc_hsp.pat_enc_csn_id AND order_med.order_status_c = 2)
definitions.source: ORDER_MED (Medication orders), PAT_ENC_HSP (Hospital patient encounters (inpatient, ED, observation))
definitions.technical_expression: EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM order_med AS om WHERE order_med.pat_enc_csn_id = pat_enc_hsp.pat_enc_csn_id AND order_med.order_status_c = 2)

definitions.name: filter:where:ORDER_MED.PAT_ENC_CSN_ID
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Encounter identifier (FK to PAT_ENC_HSP) equals e.pat_enc_csn_id

definitions.name: filter:where:ORDER_MED.ORDER_STATUS_C
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Order status (1=Pending, 2=Active/Complete, 3=Discontinued) is Active/Complete
